actionBoard.metric.weeklyRhythmBody: Start with due and blocked follow-up work, then jump into the action that needs a decision.

incident.form.createDescription: Capture the basics, then continue in the coach conversation. The coach helps structure facts, timeline, causes, and actions.
incident.form.editDescription: Update the basic incident data. Facts, timeline, causes, actions, and approval stay in the investigation workbench.
incident.form.hiraFollowupDescription: Record whether this investigation should trigger a risk assessment review.
incident.form.hiraFollowupToggleHint: Name the process, task, or HIRA that should be reviewed after this investigation.
incident.form.sifDescription: Record what actually happened separately from the credible worst realistic outcome. Estimate likelihood by imagining 1000 people doing this task under similar conditions.

legal.acknowledgement.text: Safety Secretary is a guidance tool, not legal advice. You remain responsible for checking hazards, controls, approvals, and legal duties before using any output. LLM prompt and response bodies are not logged by default; tenant_id, model, token counts, cost, latency, and error codes are logged for operations. LLM_DEBUG_LOG=1 enables full-content logging only when the operator opts in. Cloud vision is off by default at company level. The per-document modal asks before any photo is sent to any provider, including local.
legal.exportFooter.text: Safety Secretary output is guidance, not legal advice; review and approve before use.
settings.members.description: Any member can remove another member from this company. Removal invalidates that member's sessions immediately.
settings.members.title: Members
settings.invitations.title: Invitations
settings.byok.description: Store a company OpenAI-compatible key encrypted at rest, or route this company to a local OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
settings.byok.keyDescription: The key is validated once, encrypted, and never displayed again.
settings.byok.localOverrideDescription: Local endpoint config is plaintext because it is an operator setting, not a stored BYOK secret.
settings.byok.title: BYOK and local endpoint
settings.vision.description: Company vision stays off by default. Turn it on only if this company allows photo analysis; each document still asks before photos are sent to any provider.
settings.vision.offStatus: Vision is off for this company.
settings.vision.onStatus: Vision is on for this company.
settings.vision.title: Vision consent
